bf6f2b4a1dbd.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
bf6f2b4a1dbd.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
bf6f2b4a1dbd.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

ff5437f46716.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
ff5437f46716.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
ff5437f46716.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

e127d9e11533.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
e127d9e11533.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

0866d7a6b4b2.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
0866d7a6b4b2.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
0866d7a6b4b2.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

9da0967e9ee1.title: Address isolated food quality complaints from guests
9da0967e9ee1.description: Food Quality draws isolated criticism across reviews (1 negative mentions). One guest wrote: "Lovely coffee but flapjack was dry and hard  I wonder how long ago it was made.Meal typeBrunchFood: ..." Investigate whether this reflects a systemic issue or isolated incidents.
9da0967e9ee1.expected_upside: Reduce food quality complaints, protect rating
9da0967e9ee1.management_implication: Guests are telling you what's wrong. Listen.

9ffe9af2959f.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
9ffe9af2959f.description: With 1375 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
